item.title: Are Gujarat Containers Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Gujarat Containers Ltd's latest Q3 FY26 results show modest revenue growth with net sales at ₹37.02 crores, but profitability is under pressure, as net profit declined 8.64% year-on-year to ₹2.01 crores, indicating ongoing operational challenges despite some improvements in margins. Overall, the results reflect a mixed performance with stable revenue but declining profitability. Time: May 02 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are Kinetic Trust Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Kinetic Trust Ltd's latest Q3 FY26 results show a positive turnaround with a net profit of ₹0.14 crores and revenue growth to ₹0.57 crores, but concerns remain due to high debt, low return on equity, and lack of institutional support, indicating ongoing financial risks. Time: May 02 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are India Shelter Finance Corporation Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: India Shelter Finance Corporation Ltd's latest results are positive, showing a 35.49% increase in net profit and strong growth in interest income, despite a recent 17.75% decline in stock price due to market concerns. The company maintains solid operational efficiency and capital utilization, but investors should monitor market conditions closely. Time: May 02 2026 07:11 PM IST
